mapper.select: SELECT COMMENT_NO , USER_ID , INQUIRY_NO , COMMENT_CONTENT , CREATE_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , STATUS FROM INQUIRY_COMMENT WHERE COMMENT_NO = #{commentNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRY_COMMENT SET COMMENT_CONTENT = #{commentContent} , MODIFY_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE COMMENT_NO = #{commentNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
UPDATE INQUIRY_COMMENT SET STATUS = 'N' , MODIFY_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE COMMENT_NO = #{commentNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT I.COMMENT_NO , I.USER_ID , P.NICKNAME , I.INQUIRY_NO , I.COMMENT_CONTENT , I.CREATE_DATE , I.MODIFY_DATE , I.STATUS FROM INQUIRY_COMMENT I JOIN PLU_USER P ON(I.USER_ID = P.USER_ID) WHERE I.INQUIRY_NO = #{inquiryNo} AND I.STATUS = 'Y'
